_comment: Add this block to your Claude Desktop config (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json, Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json). Restart Claude Desktop after editing. Replace /absolute/path/to/.kuckuck-key with your actual key file. On a pip install, 'kuckuck' expands to the console script; with the release binary, it expands to the downloaded kuckuck_<os> executable renamed to 'kuckuck' on PATH. Legacy pip installs using the 'kuckuck-mcp' console-script alias still work; binary users only get the 'kuckuck' command (no separate kuckuck-mcp binary exists in the current release).
